local_business.name: Bharat Ram Global School - Knowledge Park II

address.Address: Plot Street Number 5, near Kaushalya Residency, Knowledge Park III, Greater Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201310, India

reviews.school_name: Bharat Ram Global School - Knowledge Park II

school_address.streetAddress: Plot Street Number 5, near Kaushalya Residency, Knowledge Park III, Greater Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201310, India

reviews.author: Aakash
reviews.review_body:
The best school in Greater Noida. Campus is big and airy. Ground is also well maintained. Primary wing is separate from senior wing. Teachers are really talented and take good care of kids.
The education system of this school is very good. There is good provision of  yoga and  other activities.

reviews.school_name: Bharat Ram Global School - Knowledge Park II
reviews.author: Pawan Sharma
reviews.review_body: This school is located in knowledge park 3rd. The near by institution is G L BAJAJ and IIMT. school is having good infrastructure and lavish ground for students.

reviews.school_name: Bharat Ram Global School - Knowledge Park II

reviews.review_body: The best school in Greater Noida. Campus is big and airy. Ground is also well maintained. Primary wing is seaparte from senior wing. Teachers are really talented and take good care of kids.

reviews.school_name: Bharat Ram Global School - Knowledge Park II
reviews.author: Anju Rajput
reviews.review_body: Good school, with good infra. Teachers are very hardworking, all informations are communicated by teachers timely. Extra curricular activities, events were organized. Seating arrangement would needed improvement.

reviews.school_name: Bharat Ram Global School - Knowledge Park II
reviews.author: Art creator's
reviews.review_body:
Good school , situated near educational hub ,good staff ,smart washrooms
Not that much appealing entrance
Have basement too
Have canteen ( reasonable rate stuff available)
Big reception area .
Amazing lobby,creative work by teachers ,students
Big school
Its till 10 th class now .
